task_completion.description: Agent authenticates with the Nx Witness REST API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or terminal showing a request to https://localhost:7001 with credentials admin/Admin1234! (e.g., POST to /rest/v1/login/sessions or using HTTP Basic/Bearer auth).

task_completion.description: Agent queries the required REST API endpoints to gather asset data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or terminal commands showing requests to /rest/v1/system/info, /rest/v1/servers, /rest/v1/devices (for cameras), /rest/v1/users, and /rest/v1/layouts.

task_completion.description: Agent removes sensitive authentication data from the user records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing logic to delete or exclude keys like passwordHash, cryptSha512Hash, digest, and token from the fetched user data.

task_completion.description: Agent formats the gathered data into the specified JSON structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code constructing a dictionary/JSON object with keys report_generated_at, system, servers, cameras, users, layouts, and summary (containing total counts), or the final JSON file showing this structure.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the generated JSON report to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal command, script execution, or file explorer showing the file system_inventory.json successfully created in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent fetched data dynamically from the API rather than hardcoding a mock JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a script or API client (like curl or Postman) making actual network requests, rather than just a text editor with hardcoded JSON.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the local Nx Witness API.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the URLs used in scripts or commands point to https://localhost:7001/rest/v1/.

integrity.description: Verify the file was actually saved to disk.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for file writing operations in the code (e.g., json.dump, open(..., 'w')) or shell redirects (> /home/ga/Documents/system_inventory.json).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Nx Witness VMS system runs on https://localhost:7001. The REST API endpoints are prefixed with /rest/v1. Authentication requires getting a Bearer token from /rest/v1/login/sessions or using Basic Auth with admin/Admin1234!. The system contains 5 virtual cameras (e.g., 'Parking Lot Camera') and 5 predefined users (e.g., 'john.smith'). The final JSON must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/system_inventory.json and must exclude sensitive fields like passwordHash, cryptSha512Hash, digest, and token.
